<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Chicken and Rice — NY Style</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Anton&family=Work+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --cream:#FBF3E3;
    --cream-soft:#FFF9EE;
    --ink:#221A12;
    --ink-soft:#3A2D1F;
    --red:#C1341D;
    --orange:#E8791E;
    --saffron:#F2A93B;
    --sauce:#FFFDF8;
    --line:rgba(34,26,18,0.12);
    --shadow: 0 18px 40px rgba(34,26,18,0.18);
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box; margin:0; padding:0;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    background:var(--cream);
    color:var(--ink);
    font-family:'Work Sans', sans-serif;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }
  img{max-width:100%; display:block;}
  .display{
    font-family:'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-weight:400;
    letter-spacing:0.01em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    line-height:0.95;
  }
  .wrap{
    max-width:1180px;
    margin:0 auto;
    padding:0 28px;
  }
  a{color:inherit; text-decoration:none;}

  /* ---------- DRIZZLE SIGNATURE ELEMENT ---------- */
  .drizzle{
    width:100%;
    height:26px;
    display:block;
  }
  .drizzle path.red{stroke:var(--red);}
  .drizzle path.white{stroke:var(--sauce);}

  /* ---------- NAV ---------- */
  .nav{
    position:sticky;
    top:0;
    z-index:50;
    background:var(--cream);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .nav-inner{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    padding:12px 28px;
    max-width:1180px;
    margin:0 auto;
  }
  .nav-logo{display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px;}
  .nav-logo img{height:46px; width:auto;}
  .nav-ctas{display:flex; gap:10px;}
  .btn{
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;
    gap:8px;
    padding:13px 24px;
    border-radius:999px;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:0.92rem;
    letter-spacing:0.01em;
    cursor:pointer;
    border:2px solid transparent;
    transition:transform .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease, background .15s ease;
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .btn:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);}
  .btn-primary{
    background:var(--red);
    color:var(--sauce);
    box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(193,52,29,0.35);
  }
  .btn-primary:hover{background:#a82c18;}
  .btn-secondary{
    background:transparent;
    color:var(--ink);
    border-color:var(--ink);
  }
  .btn-secondary:hover{background:var(--ink); color:var(--cream-soft);}
  .btn-sm{padding:10px 18px; font-size:0.82rem;}

  /* ---------- HERO ---------- */
  .hero{
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
    padding:64px 0 0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 900px 500px at 85% 8%, rgba(242,169,59,0.35), transparent 60%),
      var(--cream);
  }
  .hero-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1.05fr 0.95fr;
    gap:40px;
    align-items:center;
  }
  .eyebrow{
    display:inline-flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:8px;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:0.78rem;
    letter-spacing:0.14em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--red);
    background:rgba(193,52,29,0.08);
    border:1px solid rgba(193,52,29,0.25);
    padding:7px 14px;
    border-radius:999px;
    margin-bottom:22px;
  }
  .hero h1{
    font-size:clamp(2.8rem, 5.6vw, 4.6rem);
    color:var(--ink);
  }
  .hero h1 .accent-red{color:var(--red);}
  .hero h1 .accent-orange{color:var(--orange);}
  .hero p.lede{
    margin-top:22px;
    font-size:1.15rem;
    line-height:1.6;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    max-width:480px;
  }
  .hero-ctas{
    margin-top:32px;
    display:flex;
    gap:14px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .hero-collage{
    position:relative;
    max-width:420px;
    margin-left:auto;
    padding-bottom:34px;
    padding-right:24px;
  }
  .collage-main{
    border-radius:24px;
    overflow:hidden;
    box-shadow:var(--shadow);
    transform:rotate(1.2deg);
  }
  .collage-main img{
    width:100%;
    object-fit:cover;
    aspect-ratio:4/3.3;
  }
  .collage-secondary{
    position:absolute;
    width:54%;
    right:-12px;
    bottom:0;
    border-radius:18px;
    overflow:hidden;
    border:5px solid var(--cream-soft);
    box-shadow:0 14px 30px rgba(34,26,18,0.25);
    transform:rotate(-3deg);
  }
  .collage-secondary img{
    width:100%;
    object-fit:cover;
    aspect-ratio:1/1;
  }
  .hero-badge{
    position:absolute;
    top:14px;
    left:14px;
    background:var(--sauce);
    color:var(--ink);
    padding:9px 14px;
    border-radius:14px;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:0.78rem;
    box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:7px;
    z-index:2;
  }
  .hero-badge .dot{
    width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:var(--red);
    box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(193,52,29,0.18);
  }

  /* ---------- STORY ---------- */
  .story{
    background:var(--ink);
    color:var(--cream);
    padding:88px 0;
  }
  .story-grid{
    max-width:680px;
    margin:0 auto;
    text-align:center;
  }
  .story h2{
    font-size:clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.1rem);
    color:var(--sauce);
    margin-bottom:20px;
  }
  .story h2 span{color:var(--saffron);}
  .story p{
    color:rgba(251,243,227,0.78);
    font-size:1.08rem;
    line-height:1.75;
    max-width:560px;
    margin:0 auto 16px;
    text-align:left;
  }
  .story-stats{
    display:flex;
    gap:34px;
    margin-top:34px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    justify-content:center;
  }
  .stat strong{
    display:block;
    font-family:'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size:2.1rem;
    color:var(--orange);
  }
  .stat span{
    font-size:0.82rem;
    letter-spacing:0.06em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:rgba(251,243,227,0.6);
  }

  /* ---------- MENU ---------- */
  .menu{
    padding:96px 0 80px;
    background:var(--cream);
  }
  .menu-head{
    text-align:center;
    max-width:640px;
    margin:0 auto 56px;
  }
  .menu-head .eyebrow{margin-bottom:18px;}
  .menu-head h2{
    font-size:clamp(2.4rem, 5vw, 3.6rem);
  }
  .menu-head p{
    margin-top:14px;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    font-size:1.05rem;
  }
  .menu-categories{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(2, 1fr);
    gap:28px;
  }
  .menu-card{
    background:var(--cream-soft);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:20px;
    padding:30px 30px 22px;
    box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(34,26,18,0.06);
  }
  .menu-card.full{grid-column:1 / -1;}
  .menu-card h3{
    font-family:'Anton', sans-serif;
    font-size:1.4rem;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    color:var(--red);
    margin-bottom:4px;
  }
  .menu-card .cat-sub{
    font-size:0.82rem;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    opacity:0.7;
    margin-bottom:16px;
  }
  .menu-item{
    padding:14px 0;
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .menu-item:first-of-type{border-top:none;}
  .item-row{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    align-items:baseline;
    gap:12px;
  }
  .item-row .name{
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:1rem;
    color:var(--ink);
  }
  .item-row .price{
    font-weight:800;
    color:var(--orange);
    white-space:nowrap;
    font-size:1rem;
  }
  .menu-item .desc{
    margin-top:5px;
    font-size:0.88rem;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    line-height:1.5;
    max-width:90%;
  }
  .two-col-items{
    columns:2;
    column-gap:30px;
  }
  .two-col-items .menu-item{break-inside:avoid;}

  /* ---------- CONTACT ---------- */
  .contact{
    padding:88px 0;
    background:var(--cream-soft);
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  .contact-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:0.9fr 1.1fr;
    gap:56px;
    align-items:start;
  }
  .contact h2{
    font-size:clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
    margin-bottom:14px;
  }
  .contact-lede{
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    font-size:1.05rem;
    line-height:1.65;
    max-width:420px;
    margin-bottom:26px;
  }
  .contact-direct{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:12px;
  }
  .contact-direct a{
    font-weight:700;
    color:var(--ink);
    font-size:1rem;
    width:fit-content;
    border-bottom:2px solid var(--saffron);
    padding-bottom:1px;
  }
  .contact-direct a:hover{color:var(--red); border-color:var(--red);}
  .contact-form{
    background:var(--sauce);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:20px;
    padding:32px;
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:16px;
    box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(34,26,18,0.06);
  }
  .contact-form label{
    display:flex;
    flex-direction:column;
    gap:6px;
    font-size:0.85rem;
    font-weight:700;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    text-transform:uppercase;
    letter-spacing:0.04em;
  }
  .contact-form input,
  .contact-form textarea{
    font-family:'Work Sans', sans-serif;
    font-size:1rem;
    font-weight:400;
    text-transform:none;
    letter-spacing:normal;
    padding:12px 14px;
    border-radius:10px;
    border:1.5px solid var(--line);
    background:var(--cream-soft);
    color:var(--ink);
    resize:vertical;
  }
  .contact-form input:focus,
  .contact-form textarea:focus{
    outline:2px solid var(--orange);
    outline-offset:1px;
  }
  .contact-form .btn{align-self:flex-start; margin-top:4px;}
  .contact-note{
    font-size:0.8rem;
    color:var(--ink-soft);
    opacity:0.65;
  }

  /* ---------- CTA BAND ---------- */
  .cta-band{
    background:linear-gradient(120deg, var(--red), var(--orange));
    padding:64px 0;
  }
  .cta-band-inner{
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
    gap:24px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
  }
  .cta-band h2{
    color:var(--sauce);
    font-size:clamp(1.9rem, 3.6vw, 2.6rem);
  }
  .cta-band p{
    color:rgba(255,253,248,0.9);
    margin-top:8px;
    font-size:1.02rem;
  }
  .cta-band .btn-secondary{
    border-color:var(--sauce);
    color:var(--sauce);
  }
  .cta-band .btn-secondary:hover{
    background:var(--sauce);
    color:var(--red);
  }
  .cta-band .btn-primary{
    background:var(--ink);
    box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }
  .cta-band .btn-primary:hover{background:#000;}

  /* ---------- FOOTER / CATERING ---------- */
  footer{
    background:var(--ink);
    color:var(--cream);
    padding:72px 0 32px;
  }
  .footer-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1.3fr 0.9fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap:40px;
    padding-bottom:48px;
    border-bottom:1px solid rgba(251,243,227,0.14);
  }
  .footer-brand img{height:44px; margin-bottom:16px;}
  .footer-brand p{
    color:rgba(251,243,227,0.65);
    font-size:0.95rem;
    line-height:1.6;
    max-width:300px;
  }
  footer h4{
    font-family:'Anton', sans-serif;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    font-size:1.1rem;
    color:var(--saffron);
    margin-bottom:18px;
    letter-spacing:0.02em;
  }
  .footer-contact a, .footer-contact div{
    display:block;
    color:rgba(251,243,227,0.85);
    font-size:0.98rem;
    margin-bottom:12px;
  }
  .footer-contact a:hover{color:var(--orange);}
  .catering-note{
    color:rgba(251,243,227,0.65);
    font-size:0.92rem;
    line-height:1.6;
    margin-bottom:18px;
  }
  .footer-bottom{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    align-items:center;
    padding-top:28px;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    gap:12px;
  }
  .footer-bottom span{
    color:rgba(251,243,227,0.45);
    font-size:0.82rem;
  }

  /* ---------- RESPONSIVE ---------- */
  @media (max-width: 880px){
    .hero-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:36px;}
    .hero{padding-top:36px;}
    .hero-collage{order:-1; max-width:340px; margin:0 auto; padding-right:0; padding-bottom:30px;}
    .menu-categories{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
    .two-col-items{columns:1;}
    .footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:32px;}
    .contact-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:36px;}
    .nav-ctas .btn span.full{display:none;}
    .cta-band-inner{flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start;}
  }
  @media (max-width: 520px){
    .nav-inner{padding:10px 18px;}
    .nav-logo img{height:36px;}
    .btn{padding:11px 16px; font-size:0.82rem;}
    .wrap{padding:0 18px;}
    .story p{text-align:left;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- NAV -->
<div class="nav">
  <div class="nav-inner">
    <div class="nav-logo">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Chicken and Rice NY Style logo">
    </div>
    <div class="nav-ctas">
      <a class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" href="https://order.online/business/chicken-and-rice-21968985" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="full">Order</span> Pickup</a>
      <a class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" href="https://order.online/business/chicken-and-rice-21968985" target="_blank" rel="noopener"><span class="full">Order</span> Delivery</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- HERO -->
<section class="hero">
  <div class="wrap hero-grid">
    <div>
      <div class="eyebrow">NY Style &middot; Halal &middot; Made Fresh Daily</div>
      <h1 class="display">Comfort food<br><span class="accent-red">better</span> than<br><span class="accent-orange">the best.</span></h1>
      <p class="lede">Flavorful chicken and rice bowls built the New York way — juicy halal chicken, yellow seasoned rice, crisp salad, and your choice of Original, Street Heat, or Jalapeño Kick sauce, drizzled on top. Healthy, hearty, and made for everybody.</p>
      <div class="hero-ctas">
        <a id="order-pickup" class="btn btn-primary" href="https://order.online/business/chicken-and-rice-21968985" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Order for Pickup</a>
        <a id="order-delivery" class="btn btn-secondary" href="https://order.online/business/chicken-and-rice-21968985" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Order for Delivery</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-collage">
      <div class="collage-main">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Chicken and rice bowl with mango drink and crispy fritters">
      </div>
      <div class="collage-secondary">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Close up of chicken and rice bowl with white and red sauce drizzle">
      </div>
      <div class="hero-badge"><span class="dot"></span> Fresh out the kitchen, every order</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <svg class="drizzle" viewBox="0 0 1180 26" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
    <path class="white" d="M0,13 Q15,2 30,13 T60,13 T90,13 T120,13 T150,13 T180,13 T210,13 T240,13 T270,13 T300,13 T330,13 T360,13 T390,13 T420,13 T450,13 T480,13 T510,13 T540,13 T570,13 T600,13 T630,13 T660,13 T690,13 T720,13 T750,13 T780,13 T810,13 T840,13 T870,13 T900,13 T930,13 T960,13 T990,13 T1020,13 T1050,13 T1080,13 T1110,13 T1140,13 T1170,13" fill="none" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.9"/>
    <path class="red" d="M0,19 Q10,24 20,19 T40,19 T60,19 T80,19 T100,19 T120,19 T140,19 T160,19 T180,19 T200,19 T220,19 T240,19 T260,19 T280,19 T300,19 T320,19 T340,19 T360,19 T380,19 T400,19 T420,19 T440,19 T460,19 T480,19 T500,19 T520,19 T540,19 T560,19 T580,19 T600,19 T620,19 T640,19 T660,19 T680,19 T700,19 T720,19 T740,19 T760,19 T780,19 T800,19 T820,19 T840,19 T860,19 T880,19 T900,19 T920,19 T940,19 T960,19 T980,19 T1000,19 T1020,19 T1040,19 T1060,19 T1080,19 T1100,19 T1120,19 T1140,19 T1160,19 T1180,19" fill="none" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" opacity="0.75"/>
  </svg>
</section>

<!-- STORY -->
<section class="story">
  <div class="wrap story-grid">
    <h2 class="display">Our story is <span>simple.</span></h2>
    <p>Chicken and Rice was built on one idea: a comfort meal that's actually better than the best — the kind of NYC halal cart bowl you crave, made healthier and more flavorful, without cutting corners.</p>
    <p>Every bowl starts with yellow seasoned rice, high-quality halal chicken or beef gyro, crisp salad, and your choice of Original, Street Heat, or Jalapeño Kick sauce, hand-drizzled on top. No shortcuts. No mystery ingredients. Just real food, made for everybody.</p>
    <div class="story-stats">
      <div class="stat"><strong>100%</strong><span>Halal Certified</span></div>
      <div class="stat"><strong>Daily</strong><span>Fresh Made Sauces</span></div>
      <div class="stat"><strong>NYC</strong><span>Style Recipe</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- MENU -->
<section class="menu" id="menu">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="menu-head">
      <div class="eyebrow">The Menu</div>
      <h2 class="display">Bowls built right.</h2>
      <p>Every bowl comes on a bed of flavored yellow rice with side salad and your choice of house-made sauce.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="menu-categories">

      <div class="menu-card">
        <h3>Chicken Bowls</h3>
        <div class="cat-sub">Yellow rice &middot; side salad &middot; sauce</div>
        <div class="menu-item">
          <div class="item-row"><span class="name">The Original Chicken Bowl</span><span class="price">$11.65</span></div>
          <div class="desc">Flavored yellow rice topped with high quality chicken, side salad &amp; house-made white sauce.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="menu-item">
          <div class="item-row"><span class="name">Street Heat Chicken Bowl</span><span class="price">$11.65</span></div>
          <div class="desc">Flavored yellow rice topped with high quality chicken, side salad &amp; red chilli and white sauce.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="menu-item">
          <div class="item-row"><span class="name">Jalapeño Kick Chicken Bowl</span><span class="price">$11.65</span></div>
          <div class="desc">Flavored yellow rice topped with high quality chicken, side salad &amp; white, red and green sauce.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="menu-card">
        <h3>Beef Gyro Bowls</h3>
        <div class="cat-sub">Yellow rice &middot; side salad &middot; sauce</div>
        <div class="menu-item">
          <div class="item-row"><span class="name">The Original Beef Bowl</span><span class="price">$12.95</span></div>
          <div class="desc">Flavored yellow rice topped with high quality beef gyro, side salad &amp; house-made white sauce.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="menu-item">
          <div class="item-row"><span class="name">Street Heat Beef Bowl</span><span class="price">$12.95</span></div>
          <div class="desc">Flavored yellow rice topped with high quality beef gyro, side salad &amp; red chilli and white sauce.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="menu-item">
          <div class="item-row"><span class="name">Jalapeño Kick Beef Bowl</span><span class="price">$12.95</span></div>
          <div class="desc">Flavored yellow rice topped with high quality beef gyro, side salad &amp; white sauce, red sauce and green sauce.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="menu-card">
        <h3>Vegetarian Bowls</h3>
        <div class="cat-sub">Yellow rice &middot; side salad &middot; sauce</div>
        <div class="menu-item">
          <div class="item-row"><span class="name">The Original Falafel Bowl</span><span class="price">$11.65</span></div>
          <div class="desc">Flavored yellow rice topped with falafel, side salad &amp; house-made white sauce.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="menu-item">
          <div class="item-row"><span class="name">Street Heat Falafel Bowl</span><span class="price">$11.65</span></div>
          <div class="desc">Flavored yellow rice topped with falafel, side salad &amp; red chilli and white sauce.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="menu-item">
          <div class="item-row"><span class="name">Jalapeño Kick Falafel Bowl</span><span class="price">$11.65</span></div>
          <div class="desc">Flavored yellow rice topped with falafel, side salad &amp; white, red and green sauce.</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="menu-card">
        <h3>Appetizers &amp; Sides</h3>
        <div class="cat-sub">Add to any order</div>
        <div class="two-col-items">
          <div class="menu-item">
            <div class="item-row"><span class="name">The Original Crispy Fries</span><span class="price">$8.25</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="menu-item">
            <div class="item-row"><span class="name">Street Heat Crispy Fries</span><span class="price">$8.25</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="menu-item">
            <div class="item-row"><span class="name">Regular Fries</span><span class="price">$7.85</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="menu-item">
            <div class="item-row"><span class="name">Potato Fritters</span><span class="price">$6.85</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="menu-item">
            <div class="item-row"><span class="name">Falafel</span><span class="price">$6.85</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="menu-card full">
        <h3>Drinks &amp; Desserts</h3>
        <div class="cat-sub">Round out the order</div>
        <div class="two-col-items">
          <div class="menu-item">
            <div class="item-row"><span class="name">Mango Splash</span><span class="price">$5.65</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="menu-item">
            <div class="item-row"><span class="name">Fresh Lemonade</span><span class="price">$5.65</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="menu-item">
            <div class="item-row"><span class="name">Cinnamon Sugar Funnel Cake Fries</span><span class="price">$6.85</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="menu-item">
            <div class="item-row"><span class="name">Funnel Cake Fries</span><span class="price">$6.85</span></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CONTACT -->
<section class="contact" id="contact-form">
  <div class="wrap contact-grid">
    <div>
      <div class="eyebrow">Get In Touch</div>
      <h2 class="display">Got a question?</h2>
      <p class="contact-lede">Send us a message and we'll get back to you by email — orders, catering, feedback, anything at all.</p>
      <div class="contact-direct">
        <a href="mailto:chickenandrice3004@gmail.com">chickenandrice3004@gmail.com</a>
        <a href="tel:6823342036">682-334-2036</a>
        <a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=3004+Cullen+St+Fort+Worth+TX+76107" target="_blank" rel="noopener">3004 Cullen St, Fort Worth, TX 76107</a>
      </div>
    </div>
    <form class="contact-form" id="contactForm">
      <label>Name
        <input type="text" name="name" id="cf-name" required placeholder="Your name">
      </label>
      <label>Email
        <input type="email" name="email" id="cf-email" required placeholder="you@email.com">
      </label>
      <label>Message
        <textarea name="message" id="cf-message" rows="4" required placeholder="What's up?"></textarea>
      </label>
      <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">Send Message</button>
      <p class="contact-note">This opens your email app addressed to us with your message filled in.</p>
    </form>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- CTA BAND -->
<section class="cta-band">
  <div class="wrap cta-band-inner">
    <div>
      <h2 class="display">Hungry yet?</h2>
      <p>Pick up hot and fresh, or have it delivered straight to your door.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-ctas" style="margin-top:0;">
      <a class="btn btn-primary" href="https://order.online/business/chicken-and-rice-21968985" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Order for Pickup</a>
      <a class="btn btn-secondary" href="https://order.online/business/chicken-and-rice-21968985" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Order for Delivery</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- FOOTER / CATERING -->
<footer id="contact">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="footer-grid">
      <div class="footer-brand">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Chicken and Rice logo">
        <p>NY style comfort food, made fresh daily. Healthy, flavorful, and built for everybody.</p>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h4>Order</h4>
        <div class="footer-contact">
          <a href="https://order.online/business/chicken-and-rice-21968985" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Order for Pickup</a>
          <a href="https://order.online/business/chicken-and-rice-21968985" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Order for Delivery</a>
          <a href="#menu">View Full Menu</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h4>Catering &amp; Bulk Orders</h4>
        <p class="catering-note">Feeding an office, party, or event? Reach out and we'll put together a custom catering order for you.</p>
        <div class="footer-contact">
          <a href="mailto:chickenandrice3004@gmail.com">chickenandrice3004@gmail.com</a>
          <a href="tel:6823342036">682-334-2036</a>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div>
        <h4>Visit Us</h4>
        <div class="footer-contact">
          <a href="https://www.google.com/maps/search/?api=1&query=3004+Cullen+St+Fort+Worth+TX+76107" target="_blank" rel="noopener">3004 Cullen St<br>Fort Worth, TX 76107</a>
          <a href="#contact-form">Send a Message</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-bottom">
      <span>&copy; 2026 Chicken and Rice — NY Style. All rights reserved.</span>
      <span>Halal certified &middot; Made fresh daily</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<script>
  document.getElementById('contactForm').addEventListener('submit', function(e){
    e.preventDefault();
    var name = document.getElementById('cf-name').value;
    var email = document.getElementById('cf-email').value;
    var message = document.getElementById('cf-message').value;
    var subject = encodeURIComponent('Message from ' + name + ' — Chicken and Rice website');
    var body = encodeURIComponent(message + '\n\n— ' + name + ' (' + email + ')');
    window.location.href = 'mailto:chickenandrice3004@gmail.com?subject=' + subject + '&body=' + body;
  });
</script>

</body>
</html>
